title: chore(stm): record enhance evidence for #241 bootstrap-product
body:
## Summary

- Records enhance-skill issue-read evidence for #241 (bootstrap-product / capture-learning Mode 3).

## Context

Replaces closed PR #270 which had `Closes #241` in the commit body. A single evidence file does not close the full bootstrap-product feature — message corrected to `Refs #241`.

## Test plan

- [x] Single file added under `.garura/project/issues/241/evidence/enhance/`
- [x] No auto-close keyword — #241 stays open

Refs #241
